features.name: task input parameter assigned inside task body
features.description: Code should include a task with an input parameter that is assigned a value inside the task body, which is not allowed in SystemVerilog
features.snippet: task my_task(input [7:0] data); data = data + 1; endtask

features.name: blocked and non-blocking assignment to same variable
features.description: Code should include both blocked (=) and non-blocking (<=) assignments to the same variable within the same procedural scope
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk) begin AOA_B = 1; AOA_B <= 0; end
